:::{.hero}
:::{.hero__brand}
<div class="hero__brand-item">
  <img src="img/brand/elixir.png" alt="ELIXIR" class="hero__partner-logo hero__partner-logo--elixir">
</div>
<div class="hero__brand-item">
  <img src="img/brand/chalmers.png" alt="Chalmers" class="hero__partner-logo hero__partner-logo--chalmers">
</div>
<div class="hero__brand-item">
  <img src="img/SciLifeLab_Logotype_NEG.png" alt="SciLifeLab" class="hero__partner-logo hero__partner-logo--scilifelab">
</div>
:::

:::{.hero__copy}
:::{.hero__title}
Open Science in the
Swedish Context
:::

:::{.hero__subtitle}
Implement Open Science practices into every step of your research project
:::
:::

:::{.hero__actions}
{{< include _generated/hero-actions.qmd >}}
:::
:::
